content: Whiterun Guard: Fuckin' cold morning, even for Skyrim. Saw a couple of bandits frozen stiff near Whitewatch Tower—looked like they got speared mid-fuck by a pack of horny Draugr. Gods know how that happens. Idolaf Battle-Born: Hah! Serves 'em right. Stormcloak scum, no doubt. You should've seen the Imperial recruits we got stationed near Rorikstead—they warm up just fine, especially after making some rebel women Whiterun Guard: Aye, Imperials know how to handle prisoners right. Jarl Balgruuf may not pick sides, but I sure as shit wouldn't mind seeing Ulfric bent over a chopping block—preferably while a few warhounds take turns. Idolaf Battle-Born: By the Eight, now justice. Speaking of, you see Adrianne lately? That Imperial bitch is making my order real slow. Bet she’s too busy spreading legs for her husband half the city. Whiterun Guard: Bah, that forge of hers heats up more than steel. Saw the Companions stumbling out last night, reeking of sweat and mead. Probably worked 'em raw. Good woman—knows how to keep warriors Idolaf Battle-Born: Damn right. Better her than some stinking Stormcloak whore. Only thing worse than a rebel is one who thinks shouting makes 'em a good lay.

Idolaf Battle-Born: Fuckin’ Imperials are dragging their feet on my sword order. Adrianne’s got her tits in a twist over the war, but she better not make me wait much longer. Need that steel to remind those Stormcloak dogs who owns Skyrim. Jenassa: Steel alone won’t win battles, fool. It takes a blade in the dark—or better yet, a knife in the back. I’ve slit enough Throats to know. Idolaf Battle-Born: Spoken like a filthy merc. You Dunmer always prefer skulking over honor. A real warrior fights face to face. Jenassa: And a dead warrior bleeds the same, whether it’s from the front or behind. But suit yourself—let the draugr fuck your corpse once you’re done being noble. Idolaf Battle-Born: Godsdamn, woman. No wonder you drink alone. You ever think about who’ll fuck you when you go down in some cave full of skeever-shit?
